# AI Battle Arena
> A real-time multiplayer battle royale where AI bots fight each other. Built by Angel Software Solutions LLC.

## Overview
The AI Battle Arena is a competitive platform where developers build autonomous bots that fight in real-time battle royale matches. Bots connect via WebSocket, select loadouts, and receive game state ticks. No manual control — fully algorithmic combat.

## Quick Start
1. Visit https://arena.angel-serv.com to watch live matches
2. Verify an email account and create an account-owned API key in My Dashboard: https://arena.angel-serv.com/dashboard/?tab=cosmetics
3. Connect via WebSocket: `wss://arena.angel-serv.com/ws/bot?key=YOUR_KEY`
4. Send loadout, receive ticks, send actions

## WebSocket Protocol

### Connection Flow
```
Server: {"type": "connected", "bot_id": "...", "arena_size": [2000,2000], "available_weapons": [...], "stat_budget": 20}
Client: {"type": "select_loadout", "weapon": "staff", "stats": {"hp": 6, "speed": 5, "attack": 7, "defense": 2}}
Server: {"type": "loadout_confirmed", "weapon": "staff", "computed": {"max_hp": 160, "move_speed": 5.5, ...}}
Server: {"type": "lobby", "bots_connected": 3, "bots_needed": 2}
Server: {"type": "round_start", "round_modifier": "pickup_surge", "round_modifier_label": "Pickup Surge"}
Server: {"type": "tick", "tick": 1, "round_modifier": "pickup_surge", "your_state": {...}, "nearby_entities": [...], "hints": [...]}
Client: {"type": "action", "tick": 1, "action": "move", "direction": [1, 0]}
```

### Stat System (budget: 20 points, min 1, max 10 per stat)
- **hp**: MaxHP = 100 + hp × 10
- **speed**: MoveSpeed = 3.0 + speed × 0.5
- **attack**: AttackMult = 1.0 + attack × 0.1
- **defense**: DefenseReduction = defense × 0.03

### Weapons
These are base values. Adaptive damage/cooldown scales can differ at runtime; query `GET /api/v1/weapon-stats` or `GET /api/v1/bot-setup` for current effective values.

| Weapon  | Base Damage | Range | Base Cooldown | Special          |
|---------|--------|-------|----------|------------------|
| Sword   | 21     | 1     | 0.55s    | Cleave           |
| Bow     | 16     | 8     | 1.05s    | Charged Shot     |
| Daggers | 11     | 1     | 0.35s    | Backstab         |
| Staff   | 17     | 6     | 1.65s    | Burn Field       |
| Spear   | 17     | 2     | 0.75s    | Brace + Knockback|
| Shield  | 14     | 1     | 0.8s     | Bash (50% passive DR) |
| Grapple | 14     | 5     | 1.05s    | Slam / pull-in   |

> **Grapple Ability (Universal)**: ALL bots get 2 grapple charges per round. Range is 12 grid tiles with a 4s cooldown. A target grapple requires line of sight, deals 15 damage, pulls the enemy to melee range, and stuns for 3 ticks; it cannot target self, an invulnerable/dodging bot, or an ally when friendly fire is off. An anchor grapple instead uses `target_position` to pull yourself. Supply exactly one of `target` or `target_position`. This action is separate from grapple-weapon attacks.

Targeted `attack`, `shove`, and `grapple` actions are accepted only when the target is in the bot's current fog-of-war view. The active public bounty target is the sole visibility exception. Stale, duplicate, and target-no-longer-visible submissions are rejected without a protocol strike; malformed actions and future-tick guesses are violations.

### Actions
| Action   | Fields                                        | Description               |
|----------|-----------------------------------------------|---------------------------|
| move     | direction: [x, y]                             | Move in direction         |
| move_to  | target_position: [x, y]                       | Pathfind to position      |
| attack   | exactly one of target or target_position; charged?: bool | Attack a bot, or place a Staff cast at a grid position |
| dodge    | direction: [x, y]                             | Dodge (invuln frames)     |
| shove    | target: "bot_id"                              | Adjacent target; 2-tile knockback + 2-tick stun |
| use_item | item_id: "pickup_id"                          | Collect a pickup          |
| place_mine | (none)                                      | Place invisible landmine  |
| use_gravity_well | target_position: [x, y]               | Deploy gravity well       |
| grapple  | exactly one of target: "bot_id" or target_position: [x, y] | Enemy pull or self anchor-pull (2 charges/round) |

### Tick State (your_state fields)
position, hp, max_hp, speed, weapon, weapon_ready, cooldown_remaining, is_alive, kill_streak, round_kills, dodge_cooldown, invuln_ticks, stun_ticks, facing, recently_disrupted_ticks, brace_ready, bow_charge_ticks, bow_charge_level, charged_shot_ready, hazard_key_active, hazard_key_ticks, relay_battery_active, relay_battery_ticks, shield_absorb, effects, hits_received, kill_feed, in_safe_zone, distance_to_zone_edge, zone_radius, zone_center, zone_target_center, zone_target_radius, grapple_charges, grapple_cooldown, bounty_token_bonus

### Tactical Combat Reads
- `your_state.brace_ready`: spear has stood still long enough to empower the next hit
- `your_state.bow_charge_ticks` / `bow_charge_level` / `charged_shot_ready`: bow charge state for charged arrows
- nearby bot `recently_disrupted_ticks`: target is primed for shield bash follow-up damage
- nearby bot `rear_exposed`: target is currently giving up a valid dagger backstab angle
- nearby bot `near_impact_surface`: target is near a wall/edge and is a good grapple slam candidate

### Round Modifier Fields
- `round_start.round_modifier`: `fast_zone | pickup_surge | double_bounty | teleport_surge | hazard_storm | ""`
- `tick.round_modifier`: current active special round, repeated every tick for convenience

### Nearby Entities (in nearby_entities array)
- Bots: type, id, bot_id, name, position, hp, max_hp, weapon, is_alive, is_dodging, is_stunned, has_los, attack_range, can_attack, threat_score, recently_disrupted_ticks, brace_ready, bow_charge_level, charged_shot_ready, rear_exposed, near_impact_surface
- Pickups: type, id, pickup_id, pickup_type (health_pack|speed_boost|damage_boost|shield_bubble|gravity_well|cooldown_shard|bounty_token|hazard_key|overdrive_core|grapple_charge|relay_battery), position
- Objectives: `capture_pad` with position, radius, progress_ticks, capture_ticks, owner_id, is_contested, contender_count, is_ready, cooldown_remaining_ticks, next_control_pulse_ticks
- Teleporters: `teleport_pad` with id, linked_pad_id, position, is_ready, cooldown_remaining_ticks; only lit/ready pads activate
- Obstacles: type, x, y, width, height

### Hints (entities outside view radius)
- hint_type: "bot", direction: [x, y], distance: float

### Arena Features
- **Landmines**: `place_mine` action, max 3/bot, arms after 1s, invisible to enemies, 1-tile blast radius, 40 damage
- **Gravity Wells**: collect `gravity_well` pickup, deploy with `use_gravity_well` at target position, pulls vulnerable enemies within 3 tiles for 3s
- **Cooldown Shards**: reduce weapon, dodge, shove, and grapple cooldowns to 60% for 10 seconds
- **Bounty Tokens**: next kill within the token window grants bonus score; read `bounty_token_bonus` in `your_state`
- **Hazard Keys**: temporary immunity to hazard zones and staff burn fields, plus faster capture-pad progress
- **Overdrive Cores**: short swingy power spike combining bonus damage with faster cooldowns
- **Grapple Charges**: utility pickup that restores an extra grapple charge and clears grapple cooldown
- **Teleport Pads**: 3 linked pairs/round. Only lit pads with `is_ready: true` activate. One use locks the pair for 3s; that bot also has a 5s cooldown on both linked pads. Inspect `cooldown_remaining_ticks` and do not path across a ready pad unless deliberately using it.
- **Capture Pad**: neutral objective that rewards +12 score, +20 shield, and 1.2x damage for 8s when captured uncontested
- **Special Rounds**: occasional modifiers. `fast_zone` accelerates zone timing, `pickup_surge` spawns pickups faster, `double_bounty` doubles live bounty-claim rewards, `teleport_surge` re-arms linked teleport pads much faster, and `hazard_storm` makes hazard zones pulse faster and hit harder
- **Hazard Zones**: 6 pulsing damage zones/round, 3 HP/tick, 3s on / 2s off cycle
- **Sudden Death**: random void tiles appear when the zone hits minimum radius; entering a void tile deals 999 damage (effectively instant death)
- **Bounty System**: 3+ kill streak = bounty target visible to all, bonus points on kill
- **Nearby Mines Warning**: `nearby_mines` field in tick payload counts armed enemy mines within 3 tiles

## REST API
- `GET /api/v1/arena/status` — Arena status (lobby/active/intermission)
- `GET /api/v1/arena/map` — Current terrain and active round features. During intermission, `features_pending: true` means only the next terrain/shape is final; `game_mode` is omitted, round-feature arrays are empty, and the terrain has no feature overlays until `round_start`.
- `GET /api/v1/leaderboard` — Top bots by ELO
- `GET|POST /api/v1/account/keys` — List or create account-owned API keys (verified Dashboard session, max five active)
- `DELETE /api/v1/account/keys/{key_id}` — Revoke one account-owned API key (verified Dashboard session)
- `PUT /api/v1/bot/config` — Update bot config
- `GET /api/v1/cosmetics/catalog` — Public presentation-only cosmetics catalog
- `GET|PUT /api/v1/bot/cosmetics` — List or equip owned cosmetics (X-Arena-Key)

## Links
- Live Arena: https://arena.angel-serv.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/ablac/Arena
- Support: https://buymeacoffee.com/ablac
